title: Multi-propeller aircraft
abstract: The invention is related to the field of aircraft specifically to unmanned drones with multiple propellers and protection against external influences. Disc-shaped multi-propeller aircraft with a protective frame (1) consists of outer (2) and inner (3) rings interconnected by spokes (4) and openwork lids (11, 12) covering areas between outer (2) and inner (3) rings, the spokes (4) being arranged in two levels, the drive units - motors (5) with impellers (6) mounted on the spokes (4) and arranged in two levels in the area between the outer (2) and inner (3) rings so that counting them in sequence â the odd above and the even below, or vice versa, the adjacent impellers (6) overlap each other, the inner ring (3) is made hollow by its outer walls interconnected by thin-walled partitions, the control (8) communication nodes (9) and the batteries (7), and the central opening (10).
claims: Claims CLAIMS MULTI-PROPELLER AIRCRAFT 1. A multi -propeller aircraft which has a disk-shaped protective frame containing propulsion units, control elements and assemblies, communication means and power elements, characterized in that the protective frame (1) consists of an outer (2) and an inner (3) ring, connected by spokes (4) and openwork lids (11, 12) which cover the areas between the outer (2) and inner (3) rings, the spokes (4) arranged in two levels, in the zone between the outer (2) and inner (3) rings are mounted drive units - motors (5) with impellers (6) fixed to the spokes (4) and arranged in two levels so that counting them in sequence, the odd ones are above, and the even ones below or vice versa, the side impellers (6) overlap each other, the inner ring (3) of the frame is made hollow, its outer walls are interconnected by thin-walled partitions, the control (8) communication nodes (9) and power elements (7) are installed in the formed cavities, and the central opening (10) intended for storage of payloads. 2. A multi-propeller aircraft which has a disk-shaped protective frame containing propulsion units, control elements and assemblies, communication means and power elements, characterized in that the protective frame (1) consists of an outer (2) and an inner (3) ring, connected by spokes (4) and openwork lids (11, 12) covering the areas between the outer (2) and inner (3) rings, in the zone between the outer (2) and inner (3) rings are mounted drive units - motors (5) which are attached to the spokes (4), and their impellers (6) counting them in sequence attached as follows - the odd to one end of the motor (5) shaft, the even to the other end of the shaft of the motor (6) or vice versa, the side impellers (6) overlap each other, the inner ring (3) of the frame is made hollow, its outer walls are interconnected by thin-walled partitions, the control (8) communication nodes (9) and power elements (7) are installed in the formed cavities, and the central opening (10) intended for storage of payloads. 3. The multi-propeller aircraft according to Claim 2, characterized in that the motors (5) with impellers (6) are attached to the spokes (4) so that the adjacent motors are rotated 180Â° with respect to each other. 4. The multi-propeller aircraft according to Claims 1-3, characterized in that the number of drive units in the arithmetic sequence can be 4, 8, 12, 16 and more. 5. The multi-propeller aircraft according to Claims 1-4, characterized in that the protective frame le consists of an elliptical outer ring 2e and an inner ring 3e. 6. The multi-propeller aircraft according to Claims 1-4, characterized in that the protective frame consists of an outer and an inner ring of the oval shape.
